## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` - new feature or capability
- [ ] `fix` - bug fix
- [ ] `perf` - performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` - structural change, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` - documentation only
- [ ] `chore` - dependencies, config, tooling
- [ ] `research` - experimental or benchmark work
